name: socrates-codex-partner-plugin
description: Codex companion for the Claude cmux Socrates workflow: Korean PM critique, document-specialist planning artifacts, and file-authoritative harness review verdicts. Designed to run inside a cmux/OMX pane without ask-family shortcuts.

interface.shortDescription: Codex PM/document partner for Claude Socrates.
interface.longDescription: Provides Korean-first Socrates critique, PRD/document drafting, and harness verdict-writing skills so a Claude cmux orchestrator can collaborate with a predictable Codex partner pane.
